---
title: "Tutorials"
listing:
  id: tutorials-listing
  contents: teaching/tutorials/*/index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

## Tutorials & How-To Guides

Tutorials on psychometrics, data analysis, and quantitative methods, written in Quarto with executable R code.

<!-- 
To add a new tutorial, create a folder inside teaching/tutorials/:

teaching/tutorials/
├── intro-irt-mirt/
│   └── index.qmd
├── cfa-lavaan-basics/
│   └── index.qmd
└── bws-analysis/
    └── index.qmd

Each index.qmd should have YAML like:

---
title: "Introduction to IRT with mirt"
description: "A practical walkthrough of Rasch and GRM models in R"
date: 2026-04-01
categories: [IRT, R, psychometrics]
execute:
  echo: true
---
-->

:::{#tutorials-listing}
:::

*Tutorials are coming soon. Planned topics include: IRT with `mirt`, CFA with `lavaan`, ESEM in Mplus, Best-Worst Scaling analysis, and reliability estimation beyond Cronbach's alpha.*
